calendar.matters:
MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT GWENDOLYN MARIE STRAIN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, DENIED with five days leave to answer. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (301/JLW/DS) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558
